data.content: Preserved console tap crash semantics while keeping persistent daily teeing: the tap now reuses the shared _server log-dir helper, observes uncaught exceptions via uncaughtExceptionMonitor, logs unhandled rejections without silently changing default crash behavior, reopens after stream errors, and adds cleanup/test coverage for the process-level hooks. Quality gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Pushed to origin/main as 563c171e.
